title: MegaCLS Modpack
description: Client-side realism modpack: better audio and performance for Minecraft 1.21.11.
body:
# 🛠️ MegaCLS Modpack (v2)
**MegaCLS** is a client-side modpack that enhances immersion, graphics, and performance in Minecraft – ideal for private multiplayer servers or solo play. Completely rebuilt from the ground up for maximum optimization and feel.

## 🔍 Features & Highlights

### 🌿 Immersion & Realism
* **AmbientSounds & Sound Physics Remastered:** Experience a stunning, dynamic, and realistic 3D audio environment.
* **Presence Footsteps:** Adds deeply immersive and varied footstep sounds depending on the block you walk on.
* **Not Enough Animations & Skin Layers 3D:** Enhances third-person visual fidelity with smooth player animations and 3D skin layers.
* **ImmersiveUI:** Cleans up and enhances the user interface for better game feel.

### 👁️ Visuals & Quality of Life
* **Iris Shaders:** Full support for modern, high-performance shaders.
* **LambDynamicLights:** Real-time dynamic lighting from torches and items in your hand.
* **ShulkerBoxTooltip:** View the contents of Shulker boxes instantly without placing them down.
* **InventoryProfilesNext:** Powerful and customizable inventory sorting and management.
* **Health Indicators:** Easily see the health of mobs and players right above them.
* **Head In The Clouds:** Smoothly adjusts camera and rendering behavior when building or moving at high altitudes.

### ⚙️ Ultimate Performance Boost
* **Sodium & Sodium Extra:** Next-generation rendering engine for massive FPS gains.
* **Lithium & FerriteCore:** Optimization for physics, chunk loading, and memory (RAM) usage reduction.
* **ImmediatelyFast & MoreCulling / EntityCulling:** Extreme rendering optimizations for entities and particles.
* **BadOptimizations & Dynamic FPS:** Smooth gameplay fixes and performance saving when the game is in the background.

### 💬 Multiplayer & Utility Support
* **Simple Voice Chat:** Proximity voice chat built right into the game – perfect for interacting with others.
* **Chat Heads:** Displays player skins next to their chat messages.
* **Krypton:** Network stack optimizations to reduce lag and improve connection stability on servers.
* **Freecam:** A useful client-side utility camera to inspect your builds from any angle.

## 🎮 Technical Info
* Minecraft Version: **1.21.11**
* Mod Loader: **Fabric**
* **All mods are client-side only** – no server installation needed!
* Works perfectly in **single-player and multiplayer**.

Built specifically for the **MegaCLS** server network, but fully usable for general gameplay as well!

## ℹ️ More information:

[MegaCLS Website](https://www.megacls.com/)
